subHeadline: The question every BMW owner eventually faces, answered honestly rather than sold around. We tell you when to repair, when to replace, and when to scrap — based on real UK data, not estimates.

verdict.text: Scrap threshold — recon cost frequently exceeds car value on sub-£4k examples. The 70% BMW threshold is live here.
Safe — replacement well within value. The B47 is the sensible daily choice.
Safe — very safe across all variants. The safest 3 Series generation for engine reliability.
Watch — sub-£8k examples approach the 70% threshold. Buy with documented service history.
Watch — N63 recon can be 40–60% of vehicle value. The "N63 nightmare" is real.
Watch — M-division V8 recon frequently approaches or exceeds vehicle value on older examples. Buy only with full service history and a specialist PPI.

ruleOfThumb.title: The BMW Rule of Thumb
ruleOfThumb.text: If reconditioned engine cost runs at 70% or more of what your car is actually worth on today's market, get a scrap valuation alongside any repair quote — don't decide on repair cost alone. This is our BMW-specific threshold, derived from analysing 826 3 Series enquiries in 2025 [BMW-VERIFIED] and the real cost-vs-value data behind them.
